title: SANTIAM OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER - 211info
text: SANTIAM OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER SANTIAM OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in resource center offering one-time financial assistance for electric assistance and rent assistance through the Medicaid HRSN program, mail services, hygiene kits, Veterans services, and resource navigation for individuals who are homeless or at risk of homelessness. Also conducts housing assessments for the ARCHES housing program. 280 NE Santiam Boulevard Mill City, OR 97360 Eligibility: Drop-in Center: Unrestricted Housing services: Must be either homeless or at risk of becoming homeless Rent and electrical assistance: OHP members who meet all of the following -Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition -Have a household income 30% or less of the average yearly income where the applicant lives -Need support staying in housing -Have a lease or written rental agreement -Lack resources to prevent homelessness Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Email (971) 332-5676 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 332-5676 Administration (503) 585-6232 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Visit website or call to verify hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Utility Assistance: Shut-off notice Rent Assistance: Call for details AREA SERVED: 97325, 97342, 97346, 97350, 97358, 97360, 97383, 97384, 97392 (Serves Marion County only) Services: Drop In Centers Electric Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SANTIAM OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER
